## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify role expectations and discuss Kayleigh's potential fit at the company.](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Misunderstanding from previous conversation cleared up; Kayleigh's experience aligns well with client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Kayleigh's strength: working with progressive, experimental clients; comfortable across technical spectrum](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Salary expectations: $175k-$225k, flexible based on role/responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Kayleigh available to start immediately (last day at Wing: Oct 15)](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

## Topics

### Role Structure and Evolution

  - [3-tier client management system: content managers, managing editors, managing directors](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Skill set needs constantly evolving based on client maturity and demands](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Company reassessing how technical their ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) should be](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Potential upheaval in role structure before January; focus on improving scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)

### Kayleigh's Experience and Approach

  - [Strong background in working with technical clients (e.g., computational biology)](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Emphasizes rapport-building, asking targeted questions, and leading clients to broader thinking](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Breaks down messaging for different audience tiers (technical, investors, partners)](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Comfortable with editorial work, SEO, website content, audits](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### Client Management Strategies

  - [Kayleigh's method: empathy, listening, showing understanding of client expertise](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Helps clients broaden scope, see content as part of larger funnel](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Balances technical accuracy with accessible messaging for various audiences](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### Company Growth and Challenges

  - [Currently adding clients and staff linearly; need to change for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Improvements in tech expected to help, but team management also needs to evolve](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Kayleigh excited about tackling new, unforeseen challenges in a growing company](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andi to discuss with Bridget and get back to Kayleigh by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Explore potential fit for Kayleigh in client-facing role, considering upcoming changes](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [Consider Kayleigh's salary expectations when determining appropriate role and level](https://fathom.video/share/ZyN3DoVxUyj9TZBMCwG3zx6pn2SiTfvX?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
